LT header 
OT header 
RX header 
VALUES: 
Waiver ID, maximum 20 letters and numbers 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 
COMMENT: 
These IDs must be the approved, full federal waiver ID number assigned during the state submission 
and CMS approval process. The categories of demonstration and waiver programs include: 
• 
1915(b)(1); 
• 
1915(b)(2); 
• 
1915(b)(3), and 1915(b)(4) managed care waivers; 
• 
1915(c) home and community-based services waivers; 
• 
Combined 1915(b) and
